entities.name: SOIL CRUSTING
entities.description: The formation of a hard layer on the soil surface that restricts the emergence of crop seedlings

entities.name: ARID AND SEMIARID REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas where soil crusting is a serious problem

entities.name: SEEDLING EMERGENCE
entities.description: The process of crop seedlings breaking through the soil surface

entities.name: ROLLING-TYPE SOIL CRUST BREAKER
entities.description: A mechanical device designed to break soil crusts to improve seedling emergence

entities.name: ANIMAL DRAFT POWER
entities.description: A method of pulling the soil crust breaker using animals

entities.name: SMALL TRACTOR
entities.description: A method of pulling the soil crust breaker using a small tractor
